sourceMovie.title: Apex
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Apex works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Maze Runner: The Death Cure
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Apex clicked for you, Maze Runner: The Death Cure (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: I, Robot
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Apex clicked for you, I, Robot (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and science fiction, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Apex clicked for you, I Am Mother (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and science fiction, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Rundown

faq.question: What should I watch after Apex?
faq.answer: Try Maze Runner: The Death Cure, I, Robot, I Am Mother—each shares DNA with Apex while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Apex?
faq.answer: Apex (2021) is best described as Action, Thriller, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Apex worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
